endpoints.description: Records a geofence entry or exit event from the mobile. Server deduplicates within a 30-second window. On a recorded enter event, returns full merchant and branch context so the mobile can render merchant details and decide whether to show a local notification — no second API call needed.

security.note: Authentication is optional. Authenticated requests include a Bearer token; unauthenticated requests must include deviceId for deduplication.

regionId.description: Region identifier as returned by GET /v1/geofence/regions. Format: 'merchant:{uuid}' or 'branch:{uuid}'.

timestamp.description: Client wall-clock time of the geofence event (ISO-8601). Stored for analytics; server uses its own clock for deduplication.

deviceId.description: Stable anonymous device identifier. Required when request is unauthenticated.

recorded.description: true if the event was persisted; false if deduplicated within the cooldown window or region not found.

action.description: 'notify' when the event was recorded, event type is 'enter', and the merchant has at least one active payment channel. Mobile should schedule a local notification. 'none' in all other cases.

merchant.description: Present only when recorded=true and event=enter.

branches.description: Active branches of the merchant, sorted by distance from reported location.

422.description: Invalid request (missing required fields, unknown event type)
